name: playwright-automation-framework
description: Playwright Framework — Web + API | POM | QA & Staging Environments

scripts.test:qa:web: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test tests/web --reporter=html
scripts.test:qa:api: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test tests/api --reporter=html
scripts.test:stage:web: cross-env ENV=stage npx playwright test tests/web --reporter=html
scripts.test:stage:api: cross-env ENV=stage npx playwright test tests/api --reporter=html
scripts.test:headed: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test tests/web --headed
